texto: How you identify or what you prefer in the bedroom does not define your goals, dreams or interests, and has no baring on who you are as a human being, You don’t need to dress or behave a certain way because of your sexual orientation if you don’t want to. Trust that there are groups and resources out there that will support you no matter what. I know that I certainly appreciate all of my fans equally!
explicacao: Citação de Natasha Negovanlis sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “How you identify or what you prefer in the bedroom does not define your goals, dreams or interest…” articula motivacao, appearance, gender-identity em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como termino e gender-identity.
